headline: Will Mary Dillon’s Board Seat Steer American Airlines (AAL) Toward a More Consumer-Centric Strategy?
summary: American Airlines Group recently added former Foot Locker and Ulta Beauty chief executive Mary Dillon to its board, assigning her to the Compensation and Corporate Governance and Public Responsibility Committees. Dillon’s decades of consumer, marketing and operational experience across major global brands may shape how American balances customer experience investments, governance priorities and cost discipline amid fuel and demand uncertainty. We’ll now examine how Dillon’s appointment,...
